creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Bro, let's go to the Cheesecake Factory. Yeah man, I'll get the Skinnylicious Grilled Salmon with Steamed Broccoli, a Side House Salad, no Croutons, light dressing, and a Coke Zero. Man, I would've never thought to order that. Dude, you aren't following Seth G. yet? I'm gonna follow Seth G. right now.
caption: You're not fat because you eat out, you're fat because how you order. Order this at The Cheesecake Factory: SkinnyLicious Grilled Salmon + Steamed Broccoli + Side House Salad - No Croutons, Light Vinaigrette + Diet Coke (790 calories 50 G protein). This order will save you well over 1000 calories and keep you on track with your fitness journey. Follow @sethgolie for restaurant swaps.
ocr_summary: 4010 CALORIES vs 790 CALORIES, 94G PROTEIN vs 50G PROTEIN

swaps.swap_meal: SkinnyLicious Grilled Salmon + Steamed Broccoli + Side House Salad (no croutons, light vinaigrette) + Coke Zero

parsed.notes: Single swap. Saves over 3200 calories. Same skit format as other sethgolie reels. The Cheesecake Factory is known for extremely high calorie meals.
